text:
# `mxlpy.identify`

Numerical parameter identification estimations.

## Functions

### `profile_likelihood(model: Model, data: pd.DataFrame, parameter_name: str, parameter_values: Array, n_random: int = 10, loss_fn: fit.LossFn = fit.rmse) -> pd.Series`

Estimate the profile likelihood of model parameters given data.

Parameters
----------
model
    The model to be fitted.
data
    The data to fit the model to.
parameter_name
    The name of the parameter to profile.
parameter_values
    The values of the parameter to profile.
n_random
    Number of Monte Carlo samples.
loss_fn
    Loss function to use for fitting.
